src: INDRA (Integrated Network and Dynamical Reasoning Assembler) is an automated model assembly system interfacing with NLP systems and databases to collect knowledge, and through a process of assembly, produce causal graphs and dynamical models.
ja: INDRA（Integrated Network and Dynamical Reasoning Assembler）は、NLP システムおよびデータベースと連携して知識を収集し、因果グラフと動的モデルを生成する自動モデル構築システム
